mask.description: Mask pattern. Use '9' for digit, 'a' for letter, '*' for alphanumeric, any other char as literal separator

value.description: Current value (raw or masked — component normalises it)

onRawChange.description: Called with the raw (unmasked) value alongside the masked display value

slotChar.description: Character shown for empty mask slots

includeLiterals.description: Whether to include literal separator characters in the onChange value

id.description: Unique id for the input element
